structural_claim: Physical theories organize hierarchically through renormalization group flow, with low-energy effective descriptions systematically emerging from high-energy fundamental structures

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Physical theories form a flow in theory space under energy scale changes, with low-energy physics determined by relevant operators
Low-energy physics emerges systematically by integrating out high-energy degrees of freedom
Classical spacetime emerges as a low-energy effective description from fundamental quantum information structures
Four-dimensional spacetime emerges at large scales from microscopic discrete quantum geometries
